system.description: The lenses of this item are made of dark crystal. Even though the lenses are opaque, when placed over the eyes of the wearer, the wearer can see normally and also gains darkvision out to a range of 60 feet. Normal vision and darkvision through the crystal lenses can be made even if the wearer’s eyes are closed. If the wearer is already a creature with darkvision, the goggles increase the range of that darkvision by 60 feet.
